title: CTA Artifact
description: Compliance Traceability Artifact — portable, machine-readable CMMC Level 2 compliance proof. Published under CC BY 4.0. Schema spine: NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2.

cta_version.description: CTA schema version. Increment minor for backwards-compatible additions, major for breaking changes.

artifact_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this artifact instance. A new artifact_id is generated on every CTA Studio export.

schema.description: URI of the JSON Schema used to validate this artifact.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this artifact was generated.

valid_until.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp after which the artifact is considered stale. Recommended: 365 days from generated_at for self-assessments, 90 days for C3PAO-assessed artifacts.

issuer.description: The organization issuing this compliance artifact.

organization.description: Legal organization name as registered in SAM.gov.

cage_code.description: CAGE code — 5-character alphanumeric, assigned by DLA.

uei.description: Unique Entity Identifier — 12-character alphanumeric, assigned by SAM.gov.

sam_registered.description: Whether the issuing organization is currently registered in SAM.gov.

employee_count.description: Approximate number of employees. Used for SPRS context and design partner classification.

assessment.description: Metadata about how the assessment was conducted.

type.description: Assessment type. 'self' = CMMC Phase 1 self-assessment. 'c3pao' = C3PAO-conducted (required Phase 2+). 'third_party' = informal third-party review.

assessor_id.description: C3PAO organization ID or assessor credential, if applicable.

sprs_submission_date.description: Date SPRS score was submitted to the PIEE portal, if applicable.

connector_version.description: Version of NemoClaw or CTA Studio connector used for automated evidence collection.

controls.description: Array of CMMC Level 2 control assessments. One entry per NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 practice assessed.

invariants.description: Cross-control invariant checks. Violations automatically override maturity scores on affected controls regardless of evidence.

shared_account_violation.description: Fires when multiple users are detected authenticating with the same credential. Automatically sets maturity to 0 for AC.L2-3.1.1, IA.L2-3.5.1, and AU.L2-3.3.2.

detected.description: Whether a shared account violation was detected.

affected_controls.description: Control IDs whose maturity is forced to 0 by this violation.

detail.description: Description of the shared account(s) detected.

source.description: System or connector that detected the violation (e.g., Okta, AzureAD, CrowdStrike).

sprs_score.description: Calculated SPRS score per the DoD Assessment Methodology for NIST SP 800-171 (v1.2.1).

calculated.description: Calculated SPRS score. Range: -203 (all controls failed) to +110 (all controls met). Score of 88+ required for C3PAO assessment eligibility.

deductions.description: Itemized deductions contributing to the score.

poam_items.description: Count of active Plan of Action & Milestones items.

c3pao_eligible.description: Whether the calculated score meets the 88-point threshold for C3PAO assessment scheduling.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the artifact payload.

algorithm.description: Hashing algorithm used to sign the artifact.

value.description: Lowercase hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the canonical artifact payload (controls + issuer + generated_at, with signature field omitted).

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the signature was generated.

signed_by.description: System that generated the signature (e.g., 'NemoClaw v1.0', 'CTA Studio v0.1').

control_assessment.description: Assessment record for a single CMMC Level 2 practice.

control_id.description: CMMC practice ID in the format [Family].L2-[NIST 800-171 ID]. Example: AC.L2-3.1.1

nist_id.description: NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 requirement number. Example: 3.1.1

status.description: 'met' = implemented and evidenced. 'not_met' = not implemented (SPRS deduction applies). 'planned' = POA&M item exists with target date. 'not_applicable' = formally excluded with documented rationale.

maturity.description: Implementation maturity: 0=not implemented, 1=partially implemented (POA&M eligible), 2=implemented but not documented, 3=implemented and documented.

sprs_weight.description: SPRS point weight per DoD Assessment Methodology v1.2.1. High=5, Medium=3, Low=1.

poam.description: Plan of Action & Milestones for controls not yet fully implemented.

evidence.description: Evidence objects supporting the control assessment.

evidence_object.description: A single piece of evidence supporting a control assessment.

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence object.

type.description: Evidence type. 'device_inventory' covers Intune/JAMF/CrowdStrike managed device registries. 'job_traveler_audit' covers physical CUI documents on shop floors (manufacturing-specific).

source.description: System or process that produced the evidence. Examples: 'Okta', 'AzureAD', 'CrowdStrike', 'Splunk', 'Intune', 'JAMF', 'manual', 'physical_review'.

collected_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the evidence was collected.

detail.description: Human-readable description of what this evidence demonstrates.

fips_validated.description: Whether the cryptographic implementation referenced by this evidence uses a FIPS 140-2 validated module. Applicable to evidence types involving encryption (configuration_export, mfa_enforcement_report, etc.).

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence artifact, prefixed with 'sha256:'. Used for tamper detection.

connector.description: NemoClaw MCP connector that collected this evidence, if applicable.
